(German pronunciation: [[ˈmaksˌfoːɐ̯ʃtat]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:LL-Q188_(deu)-Ionenlaser-Maxvorstadt.wav "File:LL-Q188 (deu)-Ionenlaser-Maxvorstadt.wav"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Maxvorstod*) is a central borough of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), [Bavaria](/wiki/Bavaria "Bavaria"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany") and forms the Stadtbezirk (borough) 3 Maxvorstadt. Since 1992, this borough comprises the former boroughs 5, 6 and 7 (Maxvorstadt-Universität, Maxvorstadt-Königsplatz-Marsfeld and Maxvorstadt-Josephsplatz).

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8a/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_03_%28Karte%29_-_Maxvorstadt.png/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_03_%28Karte%29_-_Maxvorstadt.png)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_03_(Karte)_-_Maxvorstadt.png)

**Maxvorstadt** (German pronunciation: [[ˈmaksˌfoːɐ̯ʃtat]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:LL-Q188_(deu)-Ionenlaser-Maxvorstadt.wav "File:LL-Q188 (deu)-Ionenlaser-Maxvorstadt.wav"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Maxvorstod*) is a central borough of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), [Bavaria](/wiki/Bavaria "Bavaria"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany") and forms the Stadtbezirk (borough) 3 Maxvorstadt. Since 1992, this borough comprises the former boroughs 5, 6 and 7 (Maxvorstadt-Universität, Maxvorstadt-Königsplatz-Marsfeld and Maxvorstadt-Josephsplatz).

## Location

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Maxvorstadt&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Location")]

The borough is next to the north-western part of the Old City. The Englischer Garten is the Eastern border, [Schwabing](/wiki/Schwabing "Schwabing") is in the North, [Neuhausen-Nymphenburg](/wiki/Neuhausen-Nymphenburg "Neuhausen-Nymphenburg") in the North-West. The borough [Schwanthalerhöhe](/wiki/Schwanthalerh%C3%B6he "Schwanthalerhöhe") is its south-western neighbor and [Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt](/wiki/Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt "Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt") is in the south. The Eastern parts of Maxvorstadt are often mistakenly attributed to the borough of [Schwabing](/wiki/Schwabing "Schwabing").

## Traffic

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Maxvorstadt&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Traffic")]

The Maxvorstadt is drafted as a quadratical grid and is shaped by the north-south axes [Schleißheimer Straße](/wiki/Schlei%C3%9Fheimer_Stra%C3%9Fe_(Munich) "Schleißheimer Straße (Munich)") and [Ludwigstraße](/wiki/Ludwigstra%C3%9Fe "Ludwigstraße"); the parallel streets Amalienstraße, [Türkenstraße](/wiki/T%C3%BCrkenstra%C3%9Fe "Türkenstraße"), Barer Straße, Schraudolphstraße, Arcisstraße, Luisenstraße and Augustenstraße run between them. These two main streets are linked by the east-west connections [Gabelsbergerstraße](/wiki/Gabelsbergerstra%C3%9Fe "Gabelsbergerstraße"), Theresienstraße, Heßstraße, Schellingstraße, Zieblandstraße, Görresstraße and [Georgenstraße](/wiki/Georgenstra%C3%9Fe "Georgenstraße"), Theresienstraße and Gabelsbergerstraße are one-way streets.

The Maxvorstadt is accessible by [public transport](/wiki/Public_transport "Public transport") by the [underground](/wiki/Rapid_transit "Rapid transit") line [U2](/wiki/Munich_U-Bahn#U2 "Munich U-Bahn") and the stations [Königsplatz](/wiki/K%C3%B6nigsplatz,_Munich "Königsplatz, Munich"), [Theresienstraße](/wiki/Theresienstra%C3%9Fe_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Theresienstraße (Munich U-Bahn)") and [Josephsplatz](/wiki/Josephsplatz_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Josephsplatz (Munich U-Bahn)"), the underground lines [U3](/wiki/U3_(Munich_U-Bahn) "U3 (Munich U-Bahn)") and [U6](/wiki/Munich_U-Bahn "Munich U-Bahn") and the station [Universität](/wiki/Universit%C3%A4t_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Universität (Munich U-Bahn)") and also the underground line [U1](/wiki/Munich_U-Bahn "Munich U-Bahn") and the station [Stiglmaierplatz](/wiki/Stiglmaierplatz "Stiglmaierplatz"). Additionally, the tram lines 16, 17, 20, 21, 27 and 28 as well as several bus lines are running here.
